questions.question: Which verb means 'to eat'?
questions.explanation: 吃 (chī) = eat. Notice the 口 (mouth) radical.

questions.question: Which verb means 'to drink'?
questions.explanation: 喝 (hē) = drink. Like 吃, it has the 口 radical.

questions.question: What does 去 mean?
questions.explanation: 去 (qù) = to go (away from the speaker).

questions.question: Which means 'book'?
questions.explanation: 书 (shū) = book. 饭 = meal; 茶 = tea; 水 = water.

questions.question: What does 说 mean?
questions.explanation: 说 (shuō) = speak / say. The 言 radical (left side) marks speech-related characters.

questions.question: What does 中文 mean?
questions.explanation: 中文 (Zhōngwén) = the Chinese language. 中国 = the country; 中国人 = a Chinese person.

questions.question: What does 看 mean (HSK 1)?
options: to look at, read, or watch (depending on object)
questions.explanation: 看 (kàn) is a broad verb — 看书 (read), 看电视 (watch TV), 看朋友 (visit a friend).

questions.question: Which means 'meal / cooked rice'?
questions.explanation: 饭 (fàn) = a meal or cooked rice. 吃饭 ('eat rice') is the everyday way to say 'have a meal'.
